calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Elder and Dependent Adult Abuse Restraining Order OSC for Hearing Only.
Dept. 514, Judge: Peter J. Bush, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carol Haraburda #8052,
Judy Hitchcock, Esq. for and with Petitioner Elma Santos.
Defendant Ronald James Healey present in pro per with Witness: Leonila and Heather Healey.
Parties and Witnesses were placed under oath and testified.
Proof of Service is in the file.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Plaintiff's request for issuance of a restraining order is DENIED.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Text Ruling
